message:
feat(core): add unified e2e-chaos-soak-performance validation matrix (ft-2p9cb.6.4.1)

ScenarioCategory, ScenarioVerdict, MatrixScenario, ScenarioResult,
PromotionGate, MatrixSnapshot, MatrixDegradation, MatrixLogEntry,
ValidationMatrix with add_scenario/gate, record_result, check_gate,
latest_result, results_for, scenarios_by_category, snapshot, detect_degradation,
log_entry, reset_results. 27 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
